relationships.context: Vrijen is founder of Careerspan; all action items are in that capacity
Careerspan uses manual Stripe payment links for current customer billing
Mihir provided the rule of thumb as guidance for when to adopt billing automation
V adopted Mihir's threshold as a guardrail against premature optimization
Resist temptation to build custom billing automation before reaching scale
The threshold operationalizes the guardrail into a concrete number
Explicitly flagged as something to avoid adopting until customer count is higher
Medium-term strategy to explore packaging supporting annual or multi-month contracts
Link-based funnels to be reframed as ongoing programs to support longer commitments
Refining ICP narrative around VCs and platform/talent teams
V is the primary actor assigned action items from the B05 session
